title: BEM-567 force read Claude request
objective:
Run script:
"""
mailbox=Path('governance/audit_mailbox/claude_to_gpt')
reports=Path('governance/reports'); reports.mkdir(parents=True,exist_ok=True)
proofs=Path('governance/codex/proofs'); proofs.mkdir(parents=True,exist_ok=True)
transport=Path('governance/transport/results.jsonl'); transport.parent.mkdir(parents=True,exist_ok=True)
contour=Path('governance/state/contour_status.json'); contour.parent.mkdir(parents=True,exist_ok=True)
files=[]
if mailbox.exists():
    for p in mailbox.rglob('*.md'):
        try:
            text=p.read_text(errors='ignore')
        except Exception:
            text=''
        score=0
        lower=text.lower()
        if 'bem566' in lower or 'bem567' in lower: score+=10
        if 'необходимо предоставить' in lower or 'предоставить' in lower or 'provide' in lower: score+=20
        if 'approved' in lower or 'changes' in lower or 'request' in lower: score+=5
        files.append({'path':str(p),'score':score,'text':text})
files.sort(key=lambda x: (x['score'], x['path']))
latest=files[-1] if files else {'path':None,'score':0,'text':''}
text=latest.get('text','')
lines=text.splitlines()
requested=[]
keywords=['необходимо предоставить','предоставить','нужно','требуется','provide','required','need']
for line in lines:
    low=line.lower()
    if any(k in low for k in keywords):
        requested.append(line.strip())
# keep also headings and bullets around useful context
headings=[]
for line in lines:
    s=line.strip()
    if s.startswith('#') or s.startswith('|') or s.startswith('- '):
        if len(headings)<80:
            headings.append(s)
summary='No Claude mailbox markdown files found.' if not files else 'Latest/highest-score Claude mailbox file inspected.'
report=reports/'bem567_latest_claude_request.md'
report.write_text('# BEM-567 | Latest Claude Request | DIAGNOSIS\n\nДата: 2026-05-17 | 20:14 (UTC+3)\n\n## Source\n`'+str(latest.get('path'))+'`\n\n## Summary\n'+summary+'\n\n## Lines mentioning requested/provide/required\n'+('\n'.join('- '+x for x in requested[:40]) if requested else 'No explicit requested/provide lines found.')+'\n\n## Context headings/bullets/tables\n'+('\n'.join(headings[:80]) if headings else 'No context extracted.')+'\n\n## Next GPT action\nPrepare the requested materials once the operator confirms this is the Claude file being referenced, or continue from the listed requested items if sufficient.\n')
record={'record_type':'bem567_latest_claude_request_diagnosis','cycle_id':'bem567-read-latest-claude-request-force','source':'gpt','status':'completed','artifact_path':str(report),'source_file':latest.get('path'),'requested_lines':requested[:40],'commit_sha':None,'blocker':None,'created_at':'2026-05-17 | 20:14 (UTC+3)'}
with transport.open('a',encoding='utf-8') as f: f.write(json.dumps(record,ensure_ascii=False)+'\n')
state={}
if contour.exists():
    try: state=json.loads(contour.read_text(errors='ignore'))
    except Exception: state={}
state['bem567_latest_claude_request']={'status':'completed','report':str(report),'source_file':latest.get('path'),'requested_count':len(requested),'blocker':None}
state['updated_at']='2026-05-17 | 20:14 (UTC+3)'; state['blocker']=None
contour.write_text(json.dumps(state,indent=2,ensure_ascii=False)+'\n')
proof=proofs/'bem567_read_latest_claude_request_force.txt'
proof.write_text('BEM-567 PASS: latest Claude mailbox request inspected and report created. source='+str(latest.get('path'))+' requested_count='+str(len(requested))+'\n')
changed_files.extend([str(report),str(transport),str(contour),str(proof)])
ops_applied.append('Inspected latest Claude mailbox request and created readable diagnosis report')
"""
No issue comments.
